next_action: Preserve Iowa as COMPLETE/index_safe and rerun only maintenance truth audits unless new evidence regresses.
evidence: Reviewed 2026-06-22 the live official Iowa Department of Education files published on the district-routing pages: https://educate.iowa.gov/media/11655/download?inline (2025-26 Iowa Public School District Directory) and https://educate.iowa.gov/media/12423/download?inline (2025-26 Iowa Public School District Superintendent Information). The district directory explicitly states that districts are assigned to the county where their administrative office is physically located. Its live 2025-26 sheet preserves 325 district rows spanning all 99 Iowa counties, and every listed district row preserves County Name, AEA Name, District Name, Administrator Name, Phone, Email, and Website. This is a live official county-mapped district-routing contract, not statewide fallback. The superintendent file reinforces the same county and AEA routing structure.
